foodSafetyIncidents.note: Food safety incidents involving imported food detected by FSA/FSS, UK

borderChecks.note: Import border checks completed as percentage of declared food and feed shipments

divergenceIncidents.note: Cumulative documented divergences in UK food standards from EU baseline

sources.name: Food Standards Agency
sources.dataset: Incidents, and Allergy and Intolerance Alerts

sources.name: HMRC / DEFRA
sources.dataset: Border Target Operating Model — import check statistics

sources.name: Trade and Agriculture Commission
sources.dataset: Scrutiny reports on trade agreements and food standards

metadata.methodology: Food safety incidents from FSA and Food Standards Scotland incident reporting database — covers recalls, withdrawals and contamination alerts linked to imported products. Border check completion rates from DEFRA/HMRC Border Target Operating Model implementation statistics. Standards divergence incidents identified through Trade and Agriculture Commission reviews and FSA regulatory horizon-scanning.
knownIssues: Food safety incidents data covers reported and detected incidents — undetected incidents are by definition not captured
Border check figures for 2021-2023 represent very low check rates due to government delays in implementing controls
Divergence incidents is a novel category with no established counting methodology — figures are researcher estimates
